<!-- Generated by agents-reverse-engineer v1.2.8 -->

# src/config

Defines schemas, defaults, and loading logic for `.agents-reverse-engineer/config.yaml`, providing all configuration primitives (exclude patterns, concurrency, compression, backend selection) consumed by the orchestration and generation layers.

## Contents

**[defaults.ts](./defaults.ts)** — exports `getDefaultConcurrency()` (cores-based calculation), `DEFAULT_VENDOR_DIRS` (node_modules, dist, .git, etc.), `DEFAULT_EXCLUDE_PATTERNS` (AGENTS.md, *.lock, .env), `DEFAULT_BINARY_EXTENSIONS` (images, archives, executables), `DEFAULT_MAX_FILE_SIZE` (1MB), `DEFAULT_COMPRESSION_RATIO` (0.25), and `DEFAULT_CONFIG` object spreading all defaults.

**[schema.ts](./schema.ts)** — exports Zod schemas `ConfigSchema`, `ExcludeSchema`, `OptionsSchema`, `OutputSchema`, `GenerationSchema`, `AISchema` with inferred types (`Config`, `ExcludeConfig`, etc.); fields include `compressionRatio` (0.1–1.0, default 0.25), `backend` (claude|codex|gemini|opencode|auto), `concurrency` (1–20), `timeoutMs` (300000), `telemetry.keepRuns` (50).

**[loader.ts](./loader.ts)** — exports `loadConfig()` (reads config.yaml, validates via ConfigSchema, emits `config:loaded` trace), `findProjectRoot()` (walks upward to locate `.agents-reverse-engineer/`), `configExists()`, `writeDefaultConfig()` (creates annotated template), `ConfigError` class, `yamlScalar()` (quotes YAML special chars).

## Behavioral Contracts

**Trace Events**  
`config:loaded` — emitted by loadConfig() with fields `{ configPath, model, concurrency }`

**Debug Logs**  
`[debug] Config loaded from: <path>`  
`[debug] Model: <model>, Concurrency: <n>`  
`[debug] Config file not found, using defaults`

**Concurrency Calculation**  
`clamp(cores * 5, 2, min(memCap, 20))` where `memCap = floor(totalMemGB * 0.5 / 0.512)`  
Constants: `CONCURRENCY_MULTIPLIER = 5`, `MIN_CONCURRENCY = 2`, `MAX_CONCURRENCY = 20`, `SUBPROCESS_HEAP_GB = 0.512`, `MEMORY_FRACTION = 0.5`

**Config Template Annotations**  
Compression ratio docs: `0.10 = very concise`, `0.25 = standard`, `0.50 = detailed`  
Backend options: `claude | codex | gemini | opencode | auto`  
Model aliases: `sonnet | opus | haiku | sonnet[1m] | opusplan`

**Path Constants**  
`CONFIG_DIR = '.agents-reverse-engineer'`  
`CONFIG_FILE = 'config.yaml'`

## Integration Points

loadConfig() depends on ConfigSchema from schema.ts; schema.ts imports defaults from defaults.ts; loader.ts accepts ITraceWriter from `../orchestration/trace.js`, Logger from `../core/logger.js`; ConfigError wraps Zod validation failures as `path.join('.'): message`; ENOENT triggers default config return; yamlScalar() quotes strings matching `/[*{}\[\]?,:#&!|>'"%@`]/`.
